text:
Date - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims date - MM/DD/YYYY
 OUD_DX_MEDICAID_EVER Diagnosis and Procedure Basis for OUD First Ever Occurrence Date - Medicaid Only Claims date - MM/DD/YYYY
 OUD_DX_MEDICARE_EVER Diagnosis and Procedure Basis for OUD First Ever Occurrence Date - Medicare Only Claims date - MM/DD/YYYY
 OUD_HOSP_COMBINED Opioid-Related Hospitalization or ED - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met
